text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the day of the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes
arrives to decide the junior year champion...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's something about the track at a G1 race
that feels so different!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It even affects how I feel when I run...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, of course not! I'm so excited, I can't stay
still!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've done a lot of training, and I'm feeling like the
bee's knees right now!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
This should be my best race ever! I'm itching to
get out there and run!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm going to start off with a bang!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wooow! The G1 paddock looks totally rad from this side!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'll have to show them some incredible
racing to match all this flair!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky, I can't wait to race against you
today!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text:
With everyone calling you "Hot Rod," I knew I'd
see you here.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been training harder than ever
before.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: ...That's why I'm not going to lose!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh-ho! Well, I'll be running full steam too, so let's
make this a super fun race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It'll really be something to remember!

text_block_list.name: PA Announcement
text_block_list.text:
The runners of today's main race will soon be
entering the paddock!
